title: Kernel subagent7 implementation lane. Repository: /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto. Find the exact minimal command sequence to create a quote-post draft and ensure the x.com URL is stored as source_url rather than body text. Do not write files. Return a concrete command template using the existing local P...
summary_text: ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto && \ TEXT='（本文。x.com URLは入れない）' \ QUOTE_URL='https://x.com/<user>/status/<tweet_id>' \ /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/venv/bin/python3 - <<'PY' from notion_sync import push_new_to_notion import datetime, os, uuid text = os.environ["TEXT"].strip() quote_url = os.environ["QUOTE_URL"].strip() # Guard: quote URL must not be in body text if "x.com/" in text or "twitter.com/" in text: raise SystemExit("Body must not contain x.com/twitter.com URL; put it in source_url") post = { "id": uuid.uuid4().hex[:12], "text": text, "status": "draft", "scheduled_for": "", "created_at": datetime.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"), "title": "（タイトル）", "source_url": quote_url, # Notion "Source URLs" に保存される } page_id = push_new_to_notion(post) print(f"Created draft page: {page_id}") PY ``` このテンプレートが最小です。`source_url` は `notion_sync.py` で Notion の `Source URLs` プロパティへマップされ、本文 (`Body` / `Body JA`) には `text` のみ入ります。
